channel.title: International Polymer Processing
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in International Polymer Processing

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Dhinakaran Veeman, Mohan Kumar Subramaniyan, Lei Guo, Vijayaragavan Elumalai, Micheal Agnelo Browne DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ipp-2024-frontmatter5

item.title: A comprehensive review on residence time distributions in co-rotating twin-screw extrusion
item.description: Article by Dhinakaran Veeman, Mohan Kumar Subramaniyan, Lei Guo, Vijayaragavan Elumalai, Micheal Agnelo Browne DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ipp-2024-0081

item.title: Tearing properties, crystallization behavior, microstructure, and morphology of LLDPE with different short branched chain distributions
item.description: Article by Dhinakaran Veeman, Mohan Kumar Subramaniyan, Lei Guo, Vijayaragavan Elumalai, Micheal Agnelo Browne DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ipp-2023-4432

item.title: Synergistic modification of hydrolyzed keratin-based rigid polyurethane foam with zinc stannate and aluminum hypophosphite to improve its thermal stability and flame retardant properties
item.description: Article by Dhinakaran Veeman, Mohan Kumar Subramaniyan, Lei Guo, Vijayaragavan Elumalai, Micheal Agnelo Browne DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ipp-2024-0059

item.title: Effect of mixing temperature on the dispersion and degradation behaviors of HDPE/UHMWPE blends
item.description: Article by Dhinakaran Veeman, Mohan Kumar Subramaniyan, Lei Guo, Vijayaragavan Elumalai, Micheal Agnelo Browne DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ipp-2024-0041

item.title: Properties of polyphenylene sulfide/multiwalled carbon nanotubes composites: a comparison between compression molding and microinjection molding
item.description: Article by Dhinakaran Veeman, Mohan Kumar Subramaniyan, Lei Guo, Vijayaragavan Elumalai, Micheal Agnelo Browne DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ipp-2024-0053

item.title: Improvement of the thermal and mechanical behaviour of polystyrene (PS)-based nanocomposite films by modification of the composition and type of nanofiller
item.description: Article by Dhinakaran Veeman, Mohan Kumar Subramaniyan, Lei Guo, Vijayaragavan Elumalai, Micheal Agnelo Browne DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ipp-2024-0089

item.title: Thermally conductive, mechanically robust alumina-incorporated polyurethane films prepared by ultraviolet light curing
item.description: Article by Dhinakaran Veeman, Mohan Kumar Subramaniyan, Lei Guo, Vijayaragavan Elumalai, Micheal Agnelo Browne DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ipp-2024-0047

item.title: Flame retardant polyurethane foam prepared from compatible blends of ammonium ligninsulfonate-based and zinc alginate
item.description: Article by Dhinakaran Veeman, Mohan Kumar Subramaniyan, Lei Guo, Vijayaragavan Elumalai, Micheal Agnelo Browne DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ipp-2024-0072

item.title: Optical, electrical, dielectric and mechanical properties of microcrystalline cellulose/starch based biocomposite films
item.description: Article by Dhinakaran Veeman, Mohan Kumar Subramaniyan, Lei Guo, Vijayaragavan Elumalai, Micheal Agnelo Browne DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ipp-2023-4479

item.title: An innovative multilayered material fabricated through additive manufacturing for structural applications: method and mechanical properties
item.description: Article by Dhinakaran Veeman, Mohan Kumar Subramaniyan, Lei Guo, Vijayaragavan Elumalai, Micheal Agnelo Browne DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ipp-2024-0077
